scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c red,black "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm run build:uploader
scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project apps/ios/Playback/Playback.xcodeproj -scheme Playback -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
